calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-01-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Columbia University (Petitioner).

Mr. Siracusa addressed the issue of bond stating that the plan was that the other Trustee (Dechomai) would serve as a receiver to sell the property and account to Columbia once the property sold, that they did an accounting, that no assets went into the hand of Dechomai and that all of the disbursements were done through the title company. Mr. Siracusa also stated that the fee to Dechomai was based on the sale price of the real property/the net value, that if it was based on 100% of the real property the fee would have been $55,010.00, that Columbia waived their fee and is perfectly fine with what Dechomai did, and that they are not asking to go back to Dechomai and get money back. The First Account of Trustee, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Copy Of The Bozhenko Charitable Remainder Established Pursuant To Court Order
Off Calendar Oct-25-2017 Off Calendar
